sections.paragraph:
verb לגלם

to embody; personify; shape

verb גולם

be embodied; personified; shaped

verb להתגלם

be embodied; personified; shaped

verb לגלם (>>גילם)

to embody; personify; shape

masculine noun and adjective גולם

stupid, idiot, dummy, gawk, lubber, lummox, lunkhead, oaf; golem, robot

masculine noun גולם

pupa, chrysalis

adjective

raw, crude
